mechanism_narrative: Sustained elevation of the federal funds rate above 5.0% signals restrictive monetary policy that increases discount rates on equity valuations and reduces corporate profitability through higher borrowing costs, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Current FEDFUNDS at 5.24% indicates restrictive stance
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 55% of instances when FEDFUNDS > 5.0%, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window during tightening regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month decline in total nonfarm payroll employment signals labor market deterioration that reduces consumer spending capacity and corporate earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS declines > 50 thousand persons in one month
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 60% of instances following PAYEMS declines > 50k, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real retail sales combined with expanding housing starts signals robust consumer demand and construction activity that supports corporate revenue growth and equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS at 367941.0 million, HOUST at 1850.0 thousand
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are not significantly higher (t-test p > 0.05) when both RSAFS and HOUST are above their 12-month medians, or joint interaction coefficient is not statistically significant at p < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Contraction in industrial production below 112.0 index level signals supply-side weakness and reduced manufacturing capacity utilization that constrains corporate earnings and equity market performance, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Current INDPRO at 113.2096, above trigger threshold
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 58% of instances when INDPRO < 112.0, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate rising above 5.0% combined with declining payroll employment signals accelerating labor market deterioration that reduces household income, consumer confidence, and equity risk appetite, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE > 5.0% and PAYEMS declines > 30 thousand in one month
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of instances when both UNRATE > 5.0% and PAYEMS declines > 30k, or interaction term coefficient is not statistically significant at p < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation measured by CPI remaining above 3.0% while federal funds rate exceeds 5.0% signals real rates are restrictive and monetary policy is contractionary, constraining equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
regime_hint: restrictive monetary policy with elevated inflation
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are not significantly lower (t-test p > 0.05) when both conditions are met, or interaction coefficient is not statistically significant at p < 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts declining below 1700 thousand units signals weakening residential construction demand and reduced forward economic activity, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as investors reprrice growth expectations.
evidence_refs: fact:Current HOUST at 1850.0 thousand, above trigger
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 62% of instances when HOUST < 1700, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth measured by GDPC1 expanding at an annualized rate above 2.5% signals robust economic expansion that supports corporate earnings and equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Current GDPC1 at 11385.3 billion chained 2017 dollars
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are not significantly higher (t-test p > 0.05) in quarters following GDPC1 growth > 2.5% annualized, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.
